fields.label: KPI Name
fields.description: Display name of the KPI metric (e.g., Order Fulfillment Rate)

fields.label: KPI Code
fields.description: Unique identifier code for programmatic use (e.g., FULFILLMENT_RATE)

fields.label: Metric Type
fields.options:
Count
Sum
Average
Percentage
Ratio
Rate
Score
Custom
fields.description: Type of metric calculation

fields.label: Weight
fields.description: Weight of this KPI in overall score calculation

fields.label: Is Active
fields.description: Whether this KPI metric is currently active

fields.label: Display Order
fields.description: Order in which to display this KPI (lower numbers first)

fields.label: Data Source
fields.options:
Sub Order
Marketplace Order
Review
Listing
SKU
Cart
Return Request
Dispute
Message
Custom Query
fields.description: DocType or data source for this metric

fields.label: Formula
fields.description: Calculation formula using field names and operators (e.g., completed_orders / total_orders * 100)

fields.label: Aggregation Method
fields.options:
Sum
Average
Count
Min
Max
Latest
First
fields.description: How to aggregate data across the evaluation period

fields.label: Filter Criteria
fields.description: JSON filter criteria for data selection (e.g., {"status": "Completed"})

fields.label: Threshold Type
fields.options:
Higher is Better
Lower is Better
Range
Exact
fields.description: How to interpret the threshold values

fields.label: Target Value
fields.description: Target/ideal value for this KPI

fields.label: Warning Threshold
fields.description: Value at which to show warning (below target but not critical)

fields.label: Critical Threshold
fields.description: Value at which to flag as critical/failing

fields.label: Scoring Method
fields.options:
Linear
Step
Logarithmic
Exponential
Binary
Custom
fields.description: Method for calculating score from metric value

fields.label: Max Score
fields.description: Maximum score this KPI can contribute

fields.label: Invert Score
fields.description: Invert score calculation (for metrics where lower is better)

fields.label: Bonus Multiplier
fields.description: Multiplier applied when exceeding target (e.g., 1.5 for 50% bonus)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of what this KPI measures

fields.label: Unit
fields.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., %, orders, hours, currency)

fields.label: Decimal Places
fields.description: Number of decimal places to display

fields.label: Icon
fields.description: Icon name or class for display (e.g., fa-chart-line, fa-star)
